originatingBug: P3 axiom checks only include violations where principle field contains 'P3'

declarations: (declare-const principle String) (declare-const p3_check_generated Bool) (assert (and p3_check_generated (not (str.contains principle "P3"))))
smt.assertion: (declare-const principle String) (declare-const p3_check_generated Bool) (assert (and p3_check_generated (not (str.contains principle "P3"))))
